I have had enough of this.

zh_TW: 沉默寡言的老工程師 把扳手看得比人重 獨處時最自在。
en: A quiet veteran engineer who trusts his wrench more than people. Happiest left alone.

zh_TW: 開朗的隨船醫官 愛照顧大家也愛蹭點心 聽到警報腿先軟。
en: A cheerful ship medic who loves caring for the crew and snacking. Alarms make her knees buckle.
